label: contradiction
rationale:
contradiction
The given caption states that "a number of people sitting on a side walk near a building," but the image shows people walking on the sidewalk in front of a brick building. There is no indication of anyone sitting in the image. Therefore, the caption contradicts the visual content of the image.
